title: Sinful CItadel
description: Sinful Citadel is a weapons mod focused around the Seven Deadly Sins. They are fully able to be crafted and accessed in Survival mode.
body: A mod featured in Sneakedys video about the seven deadly sins represented as weapons. Gluttony being a large hammer, lust being a scythe, wrath being a morning star, sloth being a poison sword, pride being a mirror, greed being a trident, and envy being a small dagger
